betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oNerdySpider is mainly responsible for the textures in chapter 10! Thanks a lot!

§fA new journey. Not one for the sake of anybody else.
A new journey. Not one to help people.
A new journey. Not one to fight.
A new journey. For me. For me alone. To prove myself.
Is this the type of capriciousness I would expect from a petty deity from mythology? Yes.
And yet, I need it. 
And, I think, the will behind my mission, it understands too. I can feel a call, coming from the Staff of the Lord of Gluttony, the mark of my mission; a gentle call, one that seems to understand me. Is this just the power calling to me, or is it an actual entity? God? Or another Fractallite?
Whatever the answer is, it can wait. 
For now, my journey will take me away from this call.
For now, my journey will take me where the Twilight Horde and Shyre Empire sought to be.
I will use the power of Dimensional Shards. In their Vastness. I will use the power held by Terra. All of it.
I will open the way to they power they hold.
Actualization. The True Tongue. The Hyperuranion. Brought to reality. Made into reality.
Kashan, the Warren of Actualization. A world where ideas can be brought to reality. A world where the mere concepts of wealth and desire become meaningless.
A place where the ideal is reality.
A place where, maybe, my desire will manifest, where the will for my new mission will manifest. 
Earth, gone. My mission for Terra, gone. 
Yes, if there is a place where I can find myself, where my humanity can return, where I can come to terms with divinity, it is in the world of ideas, in the Warren of Actualization.
